tests.title: Valid Checkout flow

params.script: (function(){const el=document.getElementById("add-to-cart-sauce-labs-backpack"); if(el) el.click();})()

tests.body: async()=>{await LoginPage.open();await LoginPage.login("standard_user","secret_sauce");await InventoryPage.addFirstProductToCart();await(await InventoryPage.shoppingCartLink).click();const checkoutBtn=await $("#checkout");await checkoutBtn.waitForExist({timeout:5e3});await checkoutBtn.click();await CheckoutPage.fillCheckoutForm("John","Doe","12345");await(await CheckoutPage.continueButton).click();await(await CheckoutPage.finishButton).click();const completeHeader=await $("h2.complete-header");await expect(completeHeader).toBeExisting()}
